betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Automatic Buzz Saw§f

§aA fuel-powered tree farm that chops, collects, and replants automatically!§f

§bThe Automatic Buzz Saw§f automates tree chopping in a §e10-block radius§f. It detects trees, cuts them, and replants saplings automatically. It also supports crop farming — replanting seeds automatically.

§6Crafting§f (§bSteel Anvil or above§f):
§b• 4×§f Steel Plate
§b• 12×§f Iron Ingot
§b• 2×§f Industrial Grade Copper
§b• 2×§f Vacuum Tube
§b• 1×§f Sawblade

§6Acceptable Fuels§f (burnable oils, not electricity):
§b• Wood Oil§f
§b• Ethanol§f
§b• Heavy Oil§f
§b• Fish Oil§f

§6Automates§f:
§b• Wood§f — logs, planks
§b• Latex§f — rubber production
§b• Hemp§f — fiber
§b• Mustard Willows§f — nuclear waste processing

§eTip§f: Fuel the Buzz Saw with Ethanol for clean burning. Place it in the center of your tree farm for maximum coverage. The green area in the GUI shows detection range, red shows cutting range, and black shows areas it cannot reach!
